title: Salemi (Wine) (Tariff notice 28)
body: "For information only.  New regulation  A New regulation was published on 5 December 2025.  This published Regulation C/2025/6467 is a request for cancellation of a geographical indication.  Description of the goods  Salemi (Wine).  Classification (Combined Nomenclature (CN) code)  2204  Reason  The request for cancellation is made in accordance with Article 25(2) of Regulation (EU) 2024/1143.  Contact details   Tariff ClassificationCustoms Policy & Strategy2nd Floor14 Westfield AvenueStratfordLondonE20 1HZ   Email: tariff.classification@hmrc.gov.uk  This Tariff Notice is published for information purposes only. "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
